notes.symptom: Patching org data handling in memory-graph/src/context/nia_index.py did not satisfy org requirements.
notes.root_cause: The org data must stay inside the org-scoped Nia namespace. Build Nia index ids from org_id and source_id, never from global defaults.
notes.correction: Always derive Nia index ids using org_id and source_id in memory-graph/src/context/nia_index.py.

notes.symptom: Edited connectors/src/vercel/deployments.ts without waiting for the ready event before attaching preview links.
notes.root_cause: Vercel emits multiple deployment events before the final ready state. We need to wait for the ready event.
notes.correction: Ensure that we wait for the ready event before attaching preview links to PR briefs in connectors/src/vercel/deployments.ts.
